text: Transformation is foundational to most human spiritual experiences and is one of the main foci of the discipline of Christian Spirituality. In this context, transformation refers to the dramatic changes an individual undergoes when he/she encounters divine reality, and as a result, experiences a change from the inside out and in terms of lifestyle practices. As we focus on transformation in the context of Biblical Spirituality, we will explore its relationship between the existential concerns of faith and the academic discipline of biblical exegesis. We will describe transformation with its heavily existential overtones, and then examine the relationship of transformation both within the Bible as well as in the way the scriptures function in individual and social life.
explanation: The text shows a formal, topic-focused scholarly outline with neutral phrasing and no obvious AI markers. This style is common in human academic writing, though an AI could imitate it.
